products.name: Gentle Rose Cleanser
products.description: A delicate rose petal cleanser, perfect for skin that reddens easily.
products.howToUse: Apply a small amount to damp skin and massage genlty to remove impuritises. Rinse thoroughly with water.

products.name: Vitamin C Brightening Serum
products.description: Brightening serum for radiant and even-toned skin.
products.howToUse: Apply a few drops to clean skin in the morning before moisturizer and sunscreen.

products.name: Deep Hydration Face Cream
products.description: 24h deep hydration with plant-based hyaluronic acid.
products.howToUse: Apply to clean face and neck. Massage gently until absorbed. Use morning and evening.

products.name: Purifying Detox Clay Mask
products.description: Green clay mask to deeply purify pores.
products.howToUse: Apply an even layer to clean skin. Leave on 10–15 minutes, then rinse thoroughly with warm water.

products.name: Midnight Recovery Oil
products.description: Regenerating night oil to wake up with rested skin.
products.howToUse: Apply 2–3 drops to clean skin at night. Gently press into face and neck as the last step of your evening skincare routine.

products.name: Ocean Mist Toner
products.description: Refreshing toner with marine extracts and brown algae.
products.howToUse: Spray lightly onto face after cleansing. Pat gently until absorbed or use with cotton pad.

products.name: Retinol Alternative Cream
products.description: Natural anti-aging treatment with Bakuchiol.
products.howToUse: Apply a small amount to face in the evening skincare routine. Follow with moisturizer if needed

products.name: Daily Sun Shield SPF 50
products.description: Invisible, non-greasy mineral sun protection.
products.howToUse: Apply evenly to face and neck as the final step of morning skincare. Reapply during the day if exposed to sunlight.

products.name: Bamboo Exfoliating Scrub
products.description: Bamboo micro-granules for gentle mechanical exfoliation.
products.howToUse: Apply a small amount to damp skin and massage gently in circular motions, avoiding the eye area. Rinse thoroughly with warm water. Use 2–3 times per week.

products.name: Hyaluronic Acid Booster
products.description: Pure hydration concentrate to plump the skin tissues.
products.howToUse: Apply a few drops to clean skin before moisturizer. Use morning and night.

products.name: Calm Chamomile Eye Balm
products.description: Soothing eye contour balm with chamomile and blueberry.
products.howToUse: Apply a small amount around the eye area using the ring finger. Gently pat until absorbed. Use morning and night.

products.name: Niacinamide Pore Shrinker
products.description: Specific treatment to reduce enlarged pores and excess sebum.
products.howToUse: Apply 2–3 drops to clean skin before moisturizer. Use morning and night.

products.name: Matcha Tea Glow Mask
products.description: Antioxidant matcha tea mask to brighten the face.
products.howToUse: Apply to clean skin. Leave on for 5–10 minutes, then rinse thoroughly.

products.name: Lavender Sleeping Face Oil
products.description: Relaxing lavender oil to nourish the skin while you sleep.
products.howToUse: Apply a few drops to the face as the last step of your nighttime skincare routine. Leave on overnight.

products.name: Citrus Refreshing Foam
products.description: Energizing cleansing mousse with Sicilian citrus fruits.
products.howToUse: Pump a small amount onto wet hands or body. Massage to create foam and cleanse the skin. Rinse thoroughly with water.

products.name: Peptide Firming Cream
products.description: Firming cream with plant peptides for a lifting effect.
products.howToUse: Apply a small amount to clean face and neck. Use morning and evening as a moisturizer.

products.name: Probiotic Balancing Mist
products.description: Probiotic spray mist to balance the skin microbiome.
products.howToUse: Spray evenly on face after cleansing or throughout the day to hydrate and balance skin.

products.name: Gold Infused Sheet Mask
products.description: Single-use sheet mask with gold particles and collagen.
products.howToUse: Place the mask on clean skin and leave on for 15–20 minutes. Remove and gently massage the remaining serum into the skin.

products.name: Aloe Vera Soothing Gel
products.description: Soothing multipurpose gel for post-sun exposure or irritation.
products.howToUse: Apply a generous amount to face or body and gently massage until absorbed. Can be used as a moisturizer, soothing gel, or mask.

products.name: Squalane Facial Oil
products.description: Pure olive-derived squalane for hydration without weight.
products.howToUse: Apply 2–3 drops to face after serum or moisturizer to seal in hydration.
